# PRD Template — Product Requirements Document

תבנית זו היא הפלט של `/prd-generator new`. כל סעיף חייב להופיע ב-PDR הסופי. סעיף שאין לו מידע → רשום "[לא צוין — ראה Open Questions]" + reference ל-OQ-N.

**Output path:** `plans/PRD-<slug>.md`
**Generated by:** prd-generator skill (tasks/interview-questions.md → tasks/generate-prd.md)
**Handoff target:** `build-product` (for execution) + `writing-plans` (for implementation plan)

---

## File Template

```markdown
# PRD: {Product Name}

**Slug:** {slug}
**Date:** {YYYY-MM-DD}
**Owner:** {the user / user name}
**Status:** Draft → In Review → Approved
**Version:** 0.1.0

---

## TL;DR

[2-3 משפטים. עונים על: מי המשתמש, מה המוצר עושה, למה עכשיו. אם מישהו קורא רק את הסעיף הזה — הוא צריך להבין.]

**Core feature (one line):** [{feature מ-Q4}]

---

## Problem Statement

[למה המוצר הזה קיים. הבעיה הקונקרטית מ-Q3. כולל "מה המשתמש עושה היום במקום זה" ולמה זה לא עובד.]

**Current workaround:** [מה המשתמש עושה עכשיו]
**Why it fails:** [למה ה-workaround לא מספיק]

---

## Target User

[Persona ספציפי מ-Q2. לא "אנשים" — persona אחד עם שם, גיל, תפקיד, הקשר. אם יש 2 personas — רשום את שניהם, אבל סמן איזה primary.]

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Name | [שם persona] |
| Age range | [טווח גילאים] |
| Role | [תפקיד / עיסוק] |
| Location | [מיקום גיאוגרפי אם רלוונטי] |
| Tech comfort | [low / medium / high] |
| Current tool | [מה הוא משתמש בו היום] |
| Why they'll switch | [מה יגרום לו לעבור למוצר שלך] |

**Primary user:** [{name}]
**Secondary users (if any):** [{name}, {name}]

---

## Goals & Non-Goals

### Goals (MVP)
- [Goal 1 — measurable, time-bound]
- [Goal 2]
- [Goal 3 — usually "ship within X weeks" or "validate with N users"]

### Non-Goals (MVP)
- [דבר שאתה יודע שלא ב-MVP. ביטוי מפורש של "לא עושים את זה עכשיו".]
- [עוד non-goal]
- [עוד non-goal — לפחות 2, רצוי 3+]

---

## Core Feature (MVP)

[Feature אחד מ-Q4. תיאור מפורט. זה מה שעושים. לא 5 features. אחד.]

**Feature name:** [{שם קצר}]
**Why this is the core:** [למה זה ה-feature שצריך לעבוד קודם]
**Success definition:** [מתי feature זה "עובד" — observable behavior]

### Sub-capabilities (still part of MVP)
- [{sub-capability 1} — חלק מאותו MVP, לא feature נפרד]
- [{sub-capability 2}]
- [{sub-capability 3}]

---

## User Flow

[2-7 צעדים מ-Q5. כל צעד = מצב אחד שהמשתמש עובר דרכו. מתחיל ב-entry point, נגמר ב-outcome.]

| Step | User Action | System Response | Notes |
|------|-------------|-----------------|-------|
| 1 | [מה המשתמש עושה] | [מה המערכת עושה] | [הערות] |
| 2 | [action] | [response] | [notes] |
| 3 | [action] | [response] | [notes] |
| ... | ... | ... | ... |

**Entry point:** [איפה ה-flow מתחיל — app open, URL, CLI command]
**Exit / success state:** [מה המשתמש רואה כשזה הסתיים בהצלחה]

---

## Edge Cases & Failure Modes

[מ-Q6. כל edge case = "כאשר X קורה, המערכת Y". אל תכתוב סתם "handle errors" — תאר את ההתנהגות הספציפית.]

| Scenario | Expected Behavior | Priority |
|----------|-------------------|----------|
| Network unavailable | [מה קורה] | P0 |
| API returns 5xx | [מה קורה] | P0 |
| Empty state (no data) | [מה המשתמש רואה] | P1 |
| Invalid user input | [מה קורה + validation message] | P0 |
| Auth token expired | [redirect / re-auth flow] | P1 |
| Concurrent same action | [idempotency / error / race] | P2 |
| [edge case נוסף] | [התנהגות] | [...] |

---

## Acceptance Criteria

[5-15 items. נגזרים מ-user flow + edge cases. כל item הוא observable + testable.]

- [ ] [משתמש יכול לעשות X — וכשהוא עושה, Y קורה]
- [ ] [כאשר תנאי X מתקיים, המערכת מגיבה ב-Y]
- [ ] [...]
- [ ] [לפחות 5, לכל היותר 15]
- [ ] [אחד מה-items הוא success metric מ-Q8 — measurable outcome]

---

## Success Metrics

[מ-Q8. מספר, מדד, תאריך. לא "יהיה טוב".]

| Metric | Target | Timeframe | How to Measure |
|--------|--------|-----------|----------------|
| [{מדד 1}] | [X] | [Y days] | [איך מודדים] |
| [{מדד 2}] | [X] | [Y days] | [איך מודדים] |

**Primary success indicator:** [{metric + target + timeframe}]

---

## Out of Scope (MVP)

[מ-Q7. ביטוי מפורש של מה לא ב-MVP. זה הסעיף שמונע scope creep.]

- **{feature 1}:** [למה לא ב-MVP + מתי כן (אם רלוונטי)]
- **{feature 2}:** [למה לא + מתי]
- **{feature 3}:** [למה לא + מתי]
- **{feature 4}:** [לפחות 2, רצוי 4+]

---

## Technical Constraints

[מ-Q9. אם המשתמש לא ציין — "To be decided by `build-product`".]

- **Stack:** [Node.js / Python / Go / etc. — או TBD]
- **Database:** [Postgres / SQLite / none / TBD]
- **Hosting:** [Cloudflare / Vercel / self-host / TBD]
- **External APIs:** [רשימה — או none]
- **Compliance:** [GDPR / HIPAA / רגולציה ישראלית / none]
- **Performance target:** [latency / throughput / TBD]
- **Other:** [כל constraint נוסף]

---

## Assumptions

[הנחות שעשינו ולא אומתו. כל אחת מסומנת `[inferred]` או `[user-stated]`.]

- `[inferred]` [הנחה 1 — למה הנחנו, איך לאמת]
- `[user-stated]` [הנחה 2 — מה המשתמש אמר במפורש]
- `[inferred]` [הנחה 3]

---

## Open Questions

[מ-Q10. כל OQ ממוספר. P0 = חוסם MVP, P1 = חוסם V1.1, P2 = nice-to-know.]

### OQ-1: [שאלה קצרה]
- **Context:** [איך זה עלה בראיון]
- **Blocks:** [איזה sections ממתינים]
- **Suggested resolution:** [research / spike / ask user]
- **Priority:** [P0 / P1 / P2]

### OQ-2: [שאלה]
- **Context:** [...]
- **Blocks:** [...]
- **Suggested resolution:** [...]
- **Priority:** [...]

[...]

---

## Handoff Notes

**To `build-product`:**
- התחל מ-Core Feature. כל ה-sub-capabilities נכללים.
- Out of Scope = אל תבנה את זה. גם אם "נראה קל".
- Edge cases P0 = חובה לטפל. P1 = רצוי. P2 = best-effort.
- אם Open Question ב-Priority P0 לא נסגר — עצור ושאל לפני build.

**To `writing-plans`:**
- Acceptance Criteria = בסיס ל-tasks.
- User Flow = סדר הגיוני ל-implementation vertical slice.
- Technical Constraints = הגבלות על stack / dependencies.

---

*PRD generated by prd-generator skill · Built with Skillsmith*
```

---

## Section Specifications

### Frontmatter / Header
- `Slug` = kebab-case, max 4 words, מ-Q1 one-liner
- `Date` = YYYY-MM-DD
- `Owner` = user name, default "the user"
- `Status` = "Draft" (initial), bump to "In Review" when user approves, "Approved" when ready to build
- `Version` = semver, start at 0.1.0

### TL;DR
- 2-3 sentences MAX
- Answers: who, what, why now
- If reader only reads this section → they understand the product
- Include the "core feature (one line)" callout

### Problem Statement
- Start with the user's pain (Q3)
- Include "current workaround" + "why it fails" as a 2-line breakdown
- No solution in this section — only problem

### Target User
- ONE primary persona, can have secondary
- Use the table format (age, role, location, tech comfort, current tool, why switch)
- Push back: NEVER accept "אנשים" / "מפתחים" — must be specific

### Goals & Non-Goals
- 2-4 Goals, measurable
- 2-4 Non-Goals, explicit "we are NOT doing this"
- Non-Goals are crucial for scope discipline — do not skip

### Core Feature
- ONE feature. Not a list.
- Sub-capabilities are part of the same MVP, not separate features
- "Why this is the core" justifies the choice

### User Flow
- Table format (4 columns: Step / User Action / System Response / Notes)
- 2-7 steps. If more → user hasn't scoped, push back during interview
- Entry point + exit state explicit

### Edge Cases
- 5-7 scenarios minimum. Categories: network, empty, invalid input, auth, concurrent
- Each has: Scenario / Expected Behavior / Priority (P0/P1/P2)
- P0 = must handle in MVP. P1 = should. P2 = nice-to-have.

### Acceptance Criteria
- 5-15 `- [ ]` items
- Each is testable (not "should work well" but "X should happen when Y")
- One item should be the primary success metric from Q8

### Success Metrics
- 1-3 metrics
- Each has: Metric / Target / Timeframe / How to measure
- Primary success indicator called out

### Out of Scope
- 2-4 items, explicit
- Format: **{feature}:** why not now + when (if known)

### Technical Constraints
- If Q9 was empty: "To be decided by `build-product`"
- Stack / DB / Hosting / APIs / Compliance / Performance / Other

### Assumptions
- Every assumption is marked `[inferred]` or `[user-stated]`
- If the answer wasn't in the interview but was needed for the template → `[inferred]`
- If it was stated explicitly → `[user-stated]`

### Open Questions
- Enumerated OQ-1, OQ-2, ...
- Each has: Context / Blocks / Suggested resolution / Priority
- P0 = blocks MVP. Must be answered before build.
- Cross-reference with @frameworks/open-questions-catalog.md when possible

### Handoff Notes
- 2 sections: "To `build-product`" + "To `writing-plans`"
- This is the "what the next skill needs to know" section
- Not optional — explicit handoff is part of the contract

---

## Field Documentation

| Placeholder | Convention | Example |
|-------------|-----------|---------|
| `{curly}` | Variable interpolation — exact value from interview | `{Product Name}` → `Restaurant Table Booking` |
| `[square]` | Human prose — descriptive text written by skill | `[מה המשתמש עושה]` → `לוחץ על "הזמן שולחן"` |
| `(parenthesis)` | Inline reference to other sections / files | `(ראה OQ-1)` |

## Anti-Patterns

| Anti-Pattern | Why It's Bad | Fix |
|-------------|-------------|-----|
| Missing "Out of Scope" | Scope creep during build | Always include 2+ items, even if user struggled |
| Vague success metric ("יהיה טוב") | No way to know if MVP succeeded | Push back during Q8, require number |
| Features not in Q4 appearing in PRD | Invention, scope drift | Every feature traces to Q4 or explicit user statement |
| Empty Open Questions section | Hides real unknowns | If empty, say "None — all questions resolved during interview" |
| 20+ Acceptance Criteria | Not focused, hard to verify | Trim to 5-15, prioritize by P0 edge cases |
| `[inferred]` without explanation | User can't tell what was assumed | Always explain WHY it was inferred and HOW to verify |
| Long prose in User Flow | Hard to read, hard to verify | Always use the 4-column table |

---

*Template maintained by prd-generator skill · Built with Skillsmith · Skillsmith*
